Fifty doesn't really have standard synonyms as a number word. The only reasonable option would be:

L

The letter "j" doesn't have standard synonyms as a word. However, if you're referring to **jay** (the name of the letter J), some possible associations exist, but there are no true synonyms for "j" as a standalone word.
